header: Edit the page right on the page
description: The Visual Editor turns the TYPO3 backend into the site itself: editors click into a headline, type, and watch the live theme respond instantly. Combined with page-module previews for all 244 elements, nobody on your team ever publishes blind again.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor showing a Desiderio page being edited inline with live preview.
image.description: Screenshot of inline editing in the Visual Editor with Desiderio installed.
